description: ZAP baseline suppressions for SunLit Security Libraries smoke service. Each entry must have a written justification. Do not suppress high/critical findings without a fix plan.

suppressions.justification: Cache-Control headers are not set on smoke-test routes because this is a DAST test service, not a production application serving user content. No sensitive data is cached.
Storable/cacheable content warnings are expected on health-check and read-only smoke routes that return static test data. No sensitive content.
Modern Web Application alert is informational — the smoke service is an API, not a traditional web app. No action needed.
